overview.description: The Corgi Emerging Markets Equities 15% Structured Buffer ETF - May Series (EMMY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed ETF, using FLEX options to provide the price return of iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF to a cap while providing a buffer against the first 15% decline on an annual basis. This series begins on May 1 of each year. EMMY was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
